disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High-friction shearing mechanism (fall onto concrete) about an hour ago producing a raw, weeping graze over the front of the knee
trigger_question_examples: What does the wound look like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I tripped on the driveway and skidded onto the concrete about an hour ago. It scraped the top layer of skin clean off the front of my knee and now it's raw and weeping.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Visible embedded grit/gravel and dirt in the wound bed that the patient cannot rinse out
trigger_question_examples: Is there any dirt or gravel in it?
Have you been able to clean it out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — there's dirt and little bits of gravel stuck right in the raw area and I can't get them out, it hurts too much and rinsing doesn't shift them.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Uncertain tetanus immunisation status — last dose believed to be more than ten years ago
trigger_question_examples: When did you last have a tetanus shot?
Are your vaccinations up to date?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm honestly not sure when I last had a tetanus needle — it's been a long time, probably more than ten years.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Redness limited to the immediate wound margins, with no spreading rash, no thick pus, no red streak up the leg and no fever
trigger_question_examples: Is the redness spreading up your leg?
Any fever, pus, or a red streak?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The redness is just around the edge of the graze, it's not spreading up my leg, there's no thick pus and I don't have a fever.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Depth appears superficial — the patient reports only the top layer of skin is off, without gaping or exposed deeper tissue, and normal movement and feeling in the leg below the wound
trigger_question_examples: Does the wound gape open or can you see fat/deeper tissue?
Can you move your knee and feel your foot normally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's just the top layer scraped off — it doesn't gape open and I can't see anything deep. I can move my knee okay and my foot feels normal, it's just the surface that's raw and stinging.
